little_template_justification: The introduction opens with a concrete Colombia vignette and an explicit puzzle about why elites would comply with international accountability demands during peace negotiations. It then pivots to a gap claim, arguing that scholars have paid little attention to the content of peace agreements negotiated under ICC involvement.
intro_presents_main_result_quote: I find that ICC involvement, via the concrete threat of intervention and intervention itself, is associated with an increase in the likelihood that a peace agreement contains a commitment to implement domestic trials.
intro_prior_update_quote: I find that ICC involvement, via the concrete threat of intervention and intervention itself, is associated with an increase in the likelihood that a peace agreement contains a commitment to implement domestic trials.
